meaning: n.云霄塔(英国一座高耸建筑物)
examples: NEWS: Skylon Spaceplane Finally Gets approval.
The unpiloted Skylon has no external rockets, and its engines USES hydrogen and oxygen for propulsion.
It is hoped Skylon, an unpiloted 'spaceplane', will provide both cheap and reliable access to outer space.
So, it is perhaps not surprising that the Skylon venture generates so much interest.
Skylon reminds me of the optimistic days of my childhood when 60s Britain, still humming with aeronautical self-belief, built its own rockets and supersonic warplanes.
